name: @borjie/translation
description: translate() facade — DB-cached, SOTA-runner-backed, glossary-locked. Wraps @borjie/translation-sota with a translation_cache table so repeated string translations short-circuit before hitting Claude/Gemini/NLLB. Used by every non-chat surface that produces user-facing text: emails, PDFs, push, SMS, audit log render, decision-journal render, webhooks, cron workers.
